scripts.test: cd packages/core && npm run test && cd ../web && npm run test
scripts.type-check: cd packages/web && npm run type-check && cd ../desktop && npm run type-check
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace packages/core --workspace packages/web --workspace packages/desktop
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build:web && git add packages/web/dist -f && git commit -m 'Deploy to GitHub Pages' || true && git subtree push --prefix packages/web/dist origin gh-pages
